sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102280" key="tamisi/nhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰμῐσ-ίνης</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τυρός, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, cheese <sense id="n102280.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made with rennet</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0664.tlg001:138" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diocl.Fr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">138</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
